raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es skattijohs/ un reds/ 
juhs bijat prett to KUNGU
juhs Deerwu apgrehkojfchees / 
juhs bijat jums weenu leetu Tek-
tu darrijschi/ juhs bijat peepfschi
atkahpuschees no ta Zelta/ ko tas
KUNGS juhsu Deewu bij pa-
wehlejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad sagrahbu es tohsdi-
wi Galdixus/ un ismettu tohs
no mannahim abbejahm Roh-
kahm/ un talausiju tohs preefsch
juhsahm Azzim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es nomettohs preefsch
to KUNGU/ itt ka pirnak /
tschetrdefmits Deenas un tschetr-
defmits Naktis/ es Maist ne eh-
du / un Uhdeni ne dsehru/ wiffu
juhsu Grehku deht / ar ko juhs
bijat apgrehkojfchees Laumu dar-
ridami ta KUNGA Azzis/ win-
nu apkaittnadami.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo es bihjajohs par to
Bahrsibu un to Dufmibu/ ar ko
tas KUNGS pahr jums bij ap-
skaitees juhs nomaitaht/ tomehr
tas KUNGS arri to Brihdi
mann paklauſija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS apskai-
tahs arridsan fohti prett Aäro-
nii/ gribbedans winnu isdeldeht/
bet es luhsu arridsan preefsch
Aäronu to Brihdi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet juhsus Grehkus/ to
Teltu/ ko juhs bijat darrijschi /
nebmu es/ un fadedsinaju to ar
Ugguni/ un fagruhdun un famal-
in to/ teekains tas par Pihsc-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Juhs apkaitinaſat arri t
KUNGU Tabeera un Maffa
un pee teem Eekahrofchanas
Kappeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tas KUNGU
juhs isfuhtija no Kahdes-Barne
as/ fazzidams: Eita us augfchu
un eemantojeet to Semmi/ ko e-
juhs efimu dewis/tad turrejatee
juhs ta KUNGA juhsu Deewu
Wahrdam pretti/ un ne titzeja-
neds klaufijat winna Balken
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pahrgalwigi effat ju-
bijufchi prett to KUNGU/ ko
mebr es juhs efimu pasinis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es nomettohs preeff-
ta KUNGA tannis tschetrde-
mits Deenas un tschetrdefinit
Naktis/ kurras es nometto-
Semme/ tapehz ka tas KUNG-
bij fazzijis/ tas gribohts ju-
isdeldeht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet es veeluhdsu
KUNGU/ un fazzijn: Kunge-
KUNGS/ ne maita tarws Za-
dis/ un taivu eemantojamu Te-
fu/ ko tu zaur tawn Augstil-
effi atpestijs/ ko tu ar stipru Ro-
ku effi no Egiptes isweddig.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Peeminni tarws Kalpu-
Abbraima/ Jbsaika un Jeh-
ba/ ne usluhko us scho Lause-
Pahrgalwibu/ nedg us win-
Besdeewibu / nedg us win-
Grehkeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka ne ta Semme/ no ku-
renestu muhs effi isweddig/ fo-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
